# Pika Resume

> Pika Resume is a free AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create professional, ATS-optimized resumes in minutes. Built for freshers, career changers, and experienced professionals.

## Core Features

- **AI Resume Builder**: Create resumes from scratch with AI-powered content suggestions, strong action verbs, and quantified bullet points
- **LinkedIn Import**: Import your LinkedIn profile in one click for an instant, polished resume
- **Upload and Enhance**: Upload an existing PDF resume and get AI-enhanced wording, structure, and formatting
- **Job Description Matching**: Paste a job description and get a tailored resume that matches the role requirements
- **ATS-Optimized Templates**: Professional resume templates designed to pass Applicant Tracking Systems
- **AI Resume Roast**: Get brutally honest, AI-powered feedback on your resume (free)
- **Expert Resume Review**: Upload your resume and get a detailed, line-by-line review from professionals at Google, Microsoft, TikTok, and 20+ other top companies. Delivered in 3 business days.

## Who It Is For

- Job seekers creating their first resume
- Professionals updating their resume for a new role
- Career changers repositioning their experience
- Students and freshers entering the job market
- Anyone who wants an ATS-friendly, professionally formatted resume

## Pricing

- Free tier: 3 resume downloads on signup, earn more through referrals
- All AI features available to all users
